objective: Promote every selected field-day loop into an auditable route-card source unit.
ranking_policy: Rank selected loops in field execution order so earliest scheduled loops are certified first if the run is interrupted.
Preserve already certified route cards instead of regenerating them from draft candidates.
Promote remaining selected candidates only when stored geometry or generated forced-anchor GPX validates.

promotions.label: quick-draw
reasons: FD14B's current GPX already covers Quick Draw segment 1610 end-to-end before FD14C appears on the calendar. Claiming it on FD14B lets FD14C be removed from the active route menu and saves 1.63 current-calendar on-foot miles and 68 p75 minutes while preserving official segment coverage.

promotions.label: highlands-trail
reasons: Route 12's current GPX already covers Highlands segment 1576 end-to-end before FD22A appears on the calendar. Claiming it on route 12 contributes to removing FD22A and saves 2.76 current-calendar on-foot miles and 79 p75 minutes for the two Highlands segments while preserving official segment coverage.
